chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1280 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case 19-12-2023 Mr. Athar Hussain Abro, Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Irshad Hussain Dharejo, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents-university. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for respondents-university has filed schedule for payment of pensionery benefits to the petitioner. Learned counsel holding brief on behalf of petitioner’s counsel is satisfied. This petition is accordingly disposed of. However, non- payment to the petitioner would expose the violators to the contempt of Court proceedings. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
